---
knitr:
  opts_chunk: 
    collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
page-layout: full
include-in-header: 
  - _includes/fontawesome-2up.html
title: "Welcome to the DDI Talent website!"
listing:
  contents:
    - "about.qmd"
    - "people.qmd"
    - "resources.qmd"
    - "teaching.qmd"
    - "contact.qmd"
  sort: false
  type: grid
---
